subcodes.title: Words to visitors, spoken on 1913-04-19
subcodes.first_line: The Persians, the Austrians, the Germans, the French, the Italian and the English people belong to one common stock of Aryan race…
subcodes.first_line_orig: از کنار نهر گنگا از هند بایران رفتند و پس از کهرت و تعد و قبائل بعضی رو
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @universal language, @spiritual transformation, @unity in diversity
